title: Konji Pesida Venaam Lyrics Sethupathi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Konji Pesida Venaam Song Lyrics From Sethupathi
Singer: K.S.Chitra, Sriram Parthasaarathy
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

naan ninna nadandhaa kanne
un mugamae ketkudhadi

Konji pesida venaam
un kannae pesuthadaa
konjamaaga paarthaa
mazha saaral veesuthadaa

naan ninna nadandhaa kanne
un mugamae ketkudhadaa

aasa valayiduthaa
nenjam adhil viludhaa
ezhundhidum podhum anbae
meendum vilundhidudhaa

thanimai unai sududhaa
ninaivil anal tharudhaa
thalayanai pookkalilellaam
koondhal manam varudhaa

veru enna venum
neril vara venum
sathamilla muththam
tharavenum.

naan ninna nadandhaa kanne
un mugamae ketkudhadi

Konji pesida venaam
un kannae pesuthadaa
konjamaaga paarthaa
mazha saaral veesuthadaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Konji Pesida Venaam?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses love and affection between the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

K.S.Chitra and Sriram Parthasarathy have lent their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Sethupathi?

The music for the movie was composed by Nivas K Prasanna.

What is the release year of the movie Sethupathi?

The movie was released in the year 2016.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, happiness, and tranquility.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Sethupathi, the song Konji Pesida Venaam beautifully captures a romantic moment between the lead characters. Sung by K.S.Chitra and Sriram Parthasarathy, the melody is soothing and filled with love. The lyrics by Na Muthukumar convey deep affection and the joy of being in love. Nivas K Prasanna's composition enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Konji Pesida Venaam from the film Sethupathi. This beautiful duet by K.S.Chitra and Sriram Parthasarathy, with lyrics by Na Muthukumar, captures the essence of romance. Let Nivas K Prasanna's soothing composition transport you to a world of love and warmth.
stanzaMeanings: No need to speak sweetly, your eyes are talking.
When I look closely, a drizzle starts.
When I walk and stand, your face asks questions.
Even if we are far apart, love grows.
Time passes as we go far away.
No need to speak sweetly, your eyes are talking. When I look closely, a drizzle starts.
When I walk and stand, your face asks questions.
Even if we are far apart, love grows.
Time passes as we go far away.
If I desire, my heart gets trapped. Even when I rise, it falls again.
Loneliness burns you, thoughts give heat. The scent of flowers on the pillow reminds me of you.
Move a little with your sharp glance.
Stop between the cold and the fire.
What else do you want? Come close, give a silent kiss.
No need to speak sweetly, your eyes are talking.
When I look closely, a drizzle starts.
When I walk and stand, your face asks questions.
Even if we are far apart, love grows.
Time passes as we go far away.
No need to speak sweetly, your eyes are talking. When I look closely, a drizzle starts.
